tools.name: Unity
tools.role: Integration only: scene assembly, Terrain import, LOD, colliders, streaming.
tools.nextAction: Use only after external terrain/mesh/texture outputs exist.

tools.name: Blender
tools.role: Reference blockout, kitbash, pivot cleanup, local mesh staging.
tools.nextAction: Allowed for reference meshes, not for terrain heightmap authoring.

tools.name: World Creator
tools.role: Native Mac terrain authoring candidate: heightmap, erosion, splat/flow/slope masks.

tools.name: Gaea
tools.role: Preferred final terrain sculpting if available on Windows.
tools.platformNote: Officially Windows-only; downloaded .exe cannot install natively on macOS.
tools.nextAction: Use on Windows or VM only if supported, then copy exports to Assets/TerrainPipeline/ExternalTerrainExports/Gaea/.

tools.name: World Machine
tools.platformNote: Current stable release has no native Mac build in official FAQ.
tools.nextAction: Use Windows build, then copy exports to Assets/TerrainPipeline/ExternalTerrainExports/WorldMachine/.

tools.name: Houdini
tools.role: Procedural 3D terrain chunks: cliffs, arches, caves, canyons, overhangs.
tools.platformNote: Requires SideFX account/login and license. Batch output waits for a valid SideFX license.
tools.nextAction: Open License Administrator, login/activate license, then run Tools/FantasyWorldPipeline/houdini/run_houdini_build.sh.

tools.name: ZBrush
tools.role: Hero sculpt and high-detail rock/terrain/ruin surfaces.
tools.nextAction: Install/login, then place source sculpts in Assets/Art/Environment/FloatingWorld/ZBrush/.

tools.name: Substance Painter
tools.role: PBR texturing for mesh assets: BaseColor, Normal, MaskMap.
tools.platformNote: Adobe Creative Cloud is installed; Substance Painter still needs installation/license.
tools.nextAction: Open Adobe Creative Cloud and install Substance 3D Painter, then export PBR sets to Materials/Textures/Substance/.
